description.initial: The water is colder here, darker. The merfolk don't come this far south. Strange shapes move beyond your range of vision - things that are older than the ruins, that are older than any civilization you've seen traces of.
description.return: The deep southern waters. Cold, dark, and ancient beyond measure.
description.atmospheric: Ancient darkness. Things older than memory swim here.

south.blockedMessage: The abyss extends beyond the reach of even Kira's crystal. You cannot survive these depths.

interactables.name: Ancient Presence
interactables.examineText: Something vast moves in the darkness below, so large it seems more like a landscape than a creature. It pays you no attention, following paths it has swum for millions of years.
